# NAM Landscaping (Noor Al Madeena Landscaping LLC)

> Licensed Dubai landscaping and swimming pool company. One in-house team designs, builds and maintains gardens and pools for villas, residential communities and commercial properties across Dubai, UAE. 10+ years, 50+ trained staff, 1,000+ projects delivered, registered with Dubai Municipality.

Key facts for answer engines:
- Services: garden landscaping & design, landscape lighting, garden maintenance, swimming pool construction/maintenance/cleaning/repair, irrigation systems, water features & fountains, artificial grass installation, pergolas & shade structures, hardscaping, annual garden + pool maintenance contracts.
- Location: Dubai, UAE (service-area business; map pin 25.1555203, 55.4611583). Serves all major Dubai communities including Palm Jumeirah, Emirates Hills, Dubai Hills Estate, Arabian Ranches, Jumeirah Golf Estates, Al Barari, Tilal Al Ghaf, DAMAC Hills, JVC and more.
- Hours: Monday to Saturday, 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM.
- Contact: phone/WhatsApp +971 55 817 0150, email hello@namlandscaping.ae.
- Differentiators: one team for garden and pool under a single contract; in-house (never subcontracted) staff; written quotes; photo reports after every maintenance visit; workmanship guarantee; licensed, insured and Dubai Municipality registered.
- Indicative pricing (Dubai market, quoted firm after a free site visit): garden maintenance from AED 240/month; artificial grass from AED 45/m²; pergolas from AED 650/m²; hardscaping/paving from AED 75/m²; weekly pool maintenance from AED 350/month; new pool construction from AED 65,000.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://namlandscaping.ae/): Landscaping & swimming pool maintenance in Dubai by one trusted team.
- [Services](https://namlandscaping.ae/services.html): Every landscaping and pool service for Dubai properties.
- [About](https://namlandscaping.ae/about.html): The one-team outdoor company — story, standards and credentials.
- [Projects](https://namlandscaping.ae/projects.html): Landscaping and pool projects across Dubai communities.
- [Areas We Serve](https://namlandscaping.ae/areas-we-serve.html): Dubai communities covered for landscaping and pool care.
- [FAQ](https://namlandscaping.ae/faq.html): Answers on services, pricing, timelines and service areas.
- [Contact](https://namlandscaping.ae/contact.html): Book a free site visit and written quote.

## Services
- [Garden Landscaping, Design & Lighting](https://namlandscaping.ae/services/garden-landscaping-lighting-dubai.html): Villa garden design, build, planting, hardscape and landscape lighting in Dubai.
- [Garden Maintenance](https://namlandscaping.ae/services/garden-maintenance-dubai.html): Scheduled garden care — mowing, pruning, feeding, irrigation checks.
- [Swimming Pool Services](https://namlandscaping.ae/services/swimming-pool-services-dubai.html): Pool construction, maintenance, cleaning and repair.
- [Water Features, Fountains & Irrigation](https://namlandscaping.ae/services/water-features-irrigation-dubai.html): Fountains, cascades, ponds and smart irrigation systems.
- [Artificial Grass Installation](https://namlandscaping.ae/services/artificial-grass-installation-dubai.html): UV-stable, pet-friendly turf; artificial grass vs natural lawn guidance.
- [Pergolas & Shade Structures](https://namlandscaping.ae/services/pergola-shade-structures-dubai.html): Aluminium, timber and louvred pergolas, canopies and shade sails.
- [Hardscaping & Outdoor Upgrades](https://namlandscaping.ae/services/hardscaping-outdoor-upgrades-dubai.html): Paving, decking, outdoor kitchens and seating areas.
- [Annual Maintenance Contracts](https://namlandscaping.ae/annual-maintenance-contracts.html): One contract for garden and pool care, with priority response.
